issues.description: First effect should be optional (You may rest this Character). Rest action should be conditional/optional, not mandatory. Current DSL executes both Rest and RemoveLife unconditionally.
RemoveLife action is missing the condition that opponent must have 2 or less Life cards. This condition applies only to the second effect, not the first.
Second effect trigger is 'OnAttack' but text states '[End of Your Turn]'. Should be trigger:'EndOfTurn'.
Second effect needs condition checking opponent Life count (≤2). Current condition is 'Always'.

First effect structure is wrong. Should be optional ability where resting triggers the discard, not two sequential actions. Needs to model 'You may rest... : Trash...' as a conditional/optional chain.
